title: [release-1.13] Backport #2280
body: This branch is used by the c/image `release-5.26` branch.

comments.body: Merging without review to remove noise from daily CI runs.
Cc: @lsm5 for the Packit failures. AFAICS the process is trying to merge this PR into `main`, not into the `release-1.13` branch, and hits merge conflicts.
@mtrmac sorry about the delayed response. Ya, that certainly looks weird and I don't think I have seen this on the release branches of podman. I'll take it up with the packit people. Thanks

@mtrmac checked with the packit folks. This occurred because the branch was changed from `main` to `release-1.13` after PR creation. I've filed an issue with them which has been linked in this PR too. So, I'd say we leave things as they are for now.

@lsm5 the tooltips on “last week” for filing the PR and changing the branch are both …:51, so that must have been an ~immediate edit (and that matches what I would expect to happen, as soon as I noticed the large diff I would retarget).

I really can’t remember whether I triggered a restart of the Packit jobs, I’m afraid.

> @lsm5 the tooltips on “last week” for filing the PR and changing the branch are both …:51, so that must have been an ~immediate edit (and that matches what I would expect to happen, as soon as I noticed the large diff I would retarget).

ah yes, I should've checked tooltips before asking :| , anyway thanks for confirming.
> 
> I really can’t remember whether I triggered a restart of the Packit jobs, I’m afraid.

No worries at all. Thanks for the info. I'll look further with the packit team, but hopefully this issue won't be regular occurrence.
